top_signals.title: Gold Fluctuates as Traders Weigh Fed Rate Path, Hormuz Attacks
top_signals.summary: Gold swung between gains and losses as traders weighed the outlook for US interest rates and renewed attacks on shipping in the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Trump ally Nigel Farage quits UK parliament amid finance scandal to fight special election
top_signals.summary: Reform U.K. leader Nigel Farage has quit as MP for Clacton, forcing a by-election that he has said he will fight.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Abu Dhabi Royal Family Firm to Invest $1.13 Billion in LNG Company MidOcean
top_signals.summary: An investment firm owned by members of Abu Dhabi’s ruling family will invest $1.13 billion in liquefied natural gas company MidOcean Energy LLC.
